title: PickupSlot

pickupSlotEndTime.description:
The date and time the pickup slot ends, formatted as an ISO 8601 string, which is based on the 24-hour Coordinated Universal Time (UTC) clock.

Format: [YYYY]-[MM]-[DD]T[hh]:[mm]:[ss].[sss]Z
Example: 2018-08-20T07:09:00.000Z

pickupSlotId.description: Seller-defined name for the pickup slot. <!-- Max characters? -->

pickupSlotStartTime.description: The date and time the pickup slot begins, formatted as an ISO 8601 UTC string.

pickupSlotTimeZone.description: The time zone of the pickup location, returned as Time Zone Database ID (also know as an Olson time zone ID).

description: This complex type defines a time window for the pickup of a package.
